Arabic/MENA expansion opportunity; Loom's Arabic attack strategies are only offering in market
GitHub Actions / CI/CD integration is must-have; Loom MCP server fits naturally into existing DevOps workflows
Licensing: freemium model (GitHub-native developers) → premium SaaS (Loom Enterprise $50K-$200K/year) is proven by PromptFoo
Bundle opportunity: Loom + compliance templates + threat intel tools can command 2-3x pricing premium
